input_text:
Added cursor-based pagination to the /orders endpoint. Used the same CursorPaginator class we introduced for /users last sprint.

The /orders endpoint was the last major endpoint still using OFFSET-based pagination. This completes the migration we've been doing progressively across the API. No new architecture decisions here — just applying the established pattern to the remaining endpoint.

Tests pass.
reviewer_notes: Pure rollout work — applying the previously-established CursorPaginator pattern to /orders. Author explicitly says 'no new architecture decisions here'.
